title: Present Pursuit
subtitle: A pocket-sized scavenger hunt for one excellent human.

intro.headline: Your present is hiding behind a trail of clues
body: Everything happens on this phone, so keep it handy while you wander.
Each clue points you toward a physical spot, and each hidden QR opens the next page in the trail.
This starter hunt is intentionally easy to customise in src/content/hunt.json once you are ready to swap in your real clues.

finish.headline: You made it to the end
body: This screen is where your real gift reveal, note, or next instruction should live.
You can change the copy, add a call-to-action link, or even send her to one final real-world location.

steps.title: Clue One
steps.body: Find the spot where a birthday card would feel right at home.
steps.hint: Think of a place that already holds little paper memories or messages.

steps.title: Clue Two
steps.body: What area of the house is most likely to hold emergency treats?
steps.caption: A cheerful placeholder image. Swap this for a photo or clue image later.
steps.hint: Somewhere snacks go to wait patiently.

steps.title: Clue Three
steps.body: This clue can be a song, a voice note, or a tiny video clip.
steps.caption: Replace the embed URL with your own clue video.
steps.hint: Follow the vibe of the clip to the next hiding place.

steps.title: Final Clue
steps.body: The final QR should be beside the actual present or the note that reveals it.
steps.hint: Hide the last code somewhere delightfully obvious once she has earned it.
